notes: Converted the spreadsheets.values subset of the Sheets API v4 Discovery document. The googlesheets adaptor uses the googleapis SDK: appendValues -> spreadsheets.values.append, batchUpdateValues -> spreadsheets.values.batchUpdate, getValues -> spreadsheets.values.get. Only the values resource (get/append/batchUpdate) and its ValueRange/response schemas are modeled; the spreadsheets resource (create, get, batchUpdate of structure) is omitted as the adaptor does not call it.
